header.title: Playbooks
header.subtitle: Playbooks help companies onboard users to match your needs. Prescriptive yet custom to give you our guidance while recognizing this is not a one-size fits all solution.

empty-description: You haven't created any Playbooks just yet.
cta-not-allowed: You're not allowed to create Playbooks

actions.not-allowed: You're not allowed to manage Playbooks

confirmation.title: Enable Playbook?
confirmation.description: Are you sure you want to enable this Playbook?

confirmation.title: Disable Playbook?
confirmation.description: Are you sure you want to disable this Playbook?

description.auth: You may now send this link to your users and they'll be able to easily authenticate.
description.kyc: You may now send this link to your users, and they'll be able to easily verify their identity.
description.kyb: You may now send this link to your users and they'll be able to easily verify their business and identity.

errors.required: Please enter a name for the Playbook.

target.label: Target environment
target.hint: You're not allowed to copy playbooks to the live environment.

success.title: Playbook copied successfully
success.description: Playbook has been copied to {{orgName}} (using {{mode}} environment).

mode.title: Changed to {{mode}}
mode.description: Given you copied the playbook to {{mode}} environment, we've switched to this mode.

tenant.title: Changed to {{mode}}
tenant.description: Given you copied the playbook to another organization, we've switched to this new org.

tenant-and-mode.title: Changed to org {{name}}({{mode}})
tenant-and-mode.description: Given you copied the playbook to another organization and environment, we've switched to this new org and mode.

success.title: Playbook Created
success.description: Your new playbook has been successfully created.

kind.title: What type of playbook would you like to create?
kind.subtitle: This helps us better recommend which data to collect.

auth.title: Auth
auth.description: Authentication allows your users to create credentials to sign up/log in to your platform
auth.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production Auth playbooks. Use sandbox or contact us to enable this feature.

kyc.title: Onboard people
kyc.description: Know Your Customer (KYC) is the obligation of banks, businesses, and other financial institutions to identify and authenticate a person's identity before doing business with them.
kyc.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production KYC playbooks. Use sandbox or contact us to enable this feature.

kyb.title: Onboard businesses and their beneficial owners
kyb.description: Know Your Business (KYB) is the obligation to verify the identity of any entity that you do business with.
kyb.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production KYB playbooks. Use sandbox or contact us to enable this feature.

doc-only.title: Document only
doc-only.description: Users will upload and validate ID documents (passport, driver’s license, etc.), optionally collect a selfie to match the document, and custom documents like proof-of-address, proof-of-SSN, etc.
doc-only.disabled-tooltip: You are not configured to create production Document only playbooks. Use sandbox or contact us to enable this feature.

bo.title: Business owners’ information
bo.subtitle: Here's our recommendation for what you could request from business owners.
bo.info: Only a beneficial owner can verify a business. A beneficial owner is anyone who owns at least 25% of the business.

settings-auth.title: Auth playbook details
settings-auth.subtitle: Choose the login methods to allow. We will require verification (with a one-time passcode) during onboarding.

sign-in.title: Sign in methods
sign-in.subtitle: Your chosen method will be verified during the signup process.

otp.error: At least one verification is needed

settings-person.title: Your Playbook recommendation
settings-person.subtitle: Here's our recommended Playbook configuration. Feel free to edit it to better suit your needs.

name.title: Name your playbook
name.subtitle: This helps you easily identify your Playbook, especially if you have multiple ones.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Configure your own KYC settings or select a pre-defined template.

alpaca.title: Alpaca
alpaca.description: Satisfies Alpaca's KYC / AML policies and procedures

apex.title: Apex
apex.description: Satisfies Apex's KYC / AML policies and procedures

tenant-screening.title: Tenant screening
tenant-screening.description: Optimized for verifying applications in the real estate industry

residency.title: Residency
residency.subtitle: Select the countries from which your users may onboard.
residency.cannot-edit: This setting is locked based on your selected playbook template
residency.us-territories: Allow residents from U.S. territories to be onboarded

all-countries.label: All other countries
all-countries.hint: Except for embargoed or sanctioned countries

us-residents.title: U.S. residents
us-residents.empty: U.S. residents aren't allowed to be onboarded.

non-us-residents.title: Non U.S. residents
non-us-residents.all: All nationalities are allowed to be onboarded (except for embargoed or sanctioned countries)
non-us-residents.empty: Non U.S. residents aren't allowed to be onboarded.

us-territories.label: Note
us-territories.content: Residents from U.S. territories are allowed to be onboarded.

us-residents.title: U.S. residents
us-residents.empty: U.S. residents aren't allowed to be onboarded.

non-us-residents.title: Non U.S. residents
non-us-residents.empty: Non U.S. residents aren't allowed to be onboarded.

phone.label: Request users to provide their phone number
phone.title: Phone number

ssn.title: SSN
ssn.label: Request users to provide their SSN

ssn-optional.label: Allow users without an SSN to proceed with the verification
ssn-optional.hint: They will need to be manually reviewed by you.

selfie.label: Request a selfie
selfie.hint: You can optionally request users to take a selfie to validate the ID document requested.

us-legal-status.title: Legal status
us-legal-status.label: Request users to provide their legal status in the U.S.

us-territories.label: Note:
us-territories.content: Residents from U.S. territories are allowed to be onboarded.

form.accept-itin-hint: Users may use either their SSN or ITIN as part of the verification process.

verification-checks.title: Verification checks
verification-checks.subtitle: Configure which verification checks will be performed with the collected identity data.
verification-checks.cannot-edit: This setting is locked based on your selected playbook template

aml.title: Anti-Money Laundering (AML)
aml.missing-selection: You must choose one of OFAC, PEP or Adverse Media.

aml.label: Enhanced AML monitoring
aml.hint: Continuous monitoring, governmental watchlists, PEP and adverse media

ofac.label: Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC)
ofac.hint: An agency within the U.S. Department of the Treasury that is responsible for administering and enforcing economic and trade sanctions against targeted foreign countries, organizations, and individuals

pep.label: Politically Exposed Person (PEP)
pep.hint: An individual who has been entrusted with a prominent public function

adverse-media.label: Adverse media
adverse-media.hint: Negative or unfavorable information about individuals, entities, or organizations that could indicate potential involvement in financial crimes, corruption, or other illicit activities

footer.label: Note:
footer.content: we run AML checks at the time of onboarding and keep doing it monthly for all of your users onboarded through Footprint

fuzzy.label: Fuzzy matching
fuzzy.hint: Allows for slight variations in the data, such as spelling errors or minor differences in formatting

exact.label: Exact matching
exact.hint: Requires the input data to exactly match the database entry

disabled.missing-bos: You must collect beneficial owners information to enable AML monitoring.
You must collect beneficial owners' information to enable KYC checks.
disabled.must-collect-id-doc: You must collect ID document information to disable KYC checks.

personal.label: Perform database checks with collected identity data
personal.hint: Identity data collected will be verified against government databases, credit bureaus, or other official sources

bo.label: Run KYC on beneficial owners
bo.hint: Identity data collected will be verified against government databases, credit bureaus, or other official sources

bo-options.only-primary-bo-hint: The person who fills out this form

toggle.label: Run KYB
toggle.hint: If not enabled, we'll only collect the data and won't do any verification checks.

full.label: Full KYB
full.disabled: Running full KYB requires you to collect Business name, Business address and EIN, at least.

ein.label: TIN (EIN) verification only
ein.hint: We'll only verify TIN (EIN) and business name.

fraud-checks.title: Fraud checks

sentilink.label: Synthetic fraud with SentiLink
sentilink.hint: Synthetic fraud and ID theft scores
sentilink.no-live-permission: You are not configured to create production playbooks with SentiLink. Use sandbox or contact us to enable this feature.

neuro.label: Behavioral fraud with Neuro-ID
neuro.hint: Behavioral analysis and PIl familiarity, bot detection, and device and network intelligence
neuro.no-live-permission: You are not configured to create production playbooks with Neuro-ID. Use sandbox or contact us to enable this feature.

fraud-checks.none: No fraud checks are being conducted.

gov-docs.title: Collect government-issued ID
gov-docs.description: Request that users submit scanned IDs

country-specific.title: Country-specific requirements
country-specific.subtitle: You can select documents for specific countries, overriding global settings.

selfie.title: Request a selfie after ID upload

additional-docs.title: Additional documents
additional-docs.description: Additional proofs that may help you analyze the user

require-manual-review.label: Require manual review
require-manual-review.description: After the user uploads any of these documents, they will be flagged for manual review.

poa.label: Proof of address
poa.hint: Official documents displaying the user's name and address.

possn.label: Proof of SSN
possn.hint: Scan of Social Security card or official document displaying your name and Social Security Number.

investor.title: Investor profile questions
investor.subtitle: If you're a brokerage company, for instance, you're required to ask investor profile questions.

questions.employment-status: What's your employment status and occupation?
questions.funding-sources: What’s the source of your account funding?
questions.risk-tolerance: How would you describe your risk tolerance?
questions.immediate-family: Do any of the following apply to you or your immediate family?

custom-docs.title: Custom
custom-docs.description: Specify extra documents required to meet specific onboarding criteria.

name.label: Document label
name.hint: The user-facing name for this document

errors.required: Please enter a label for the document.

identifier.label: Identifier
identifier.hint: The data identifier you can use to decrypt the document in the dashboard and via API

errors.required: Please enter an identifier for the document.
errors.no-special-chars: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed

description.label: Description (optional)
description.hint: Describe the documents the user should submit. This information will be displayed to assist users in selecting the appropriate files.

prefer-upload.label: Prefer upload
prefer-upload.hint: First prompt the user to upload a file before allowing them to capture the document.

prefer-capture.label: Prefer capture
prefer-capture.hint: First prompt the user to capture the document before allowing them to upload a file.

required-auth.title: OTP (one-time-passcode) verifications
required-auth.subtitle: Select the data to verify during onboarding.
required-auth.error: At least one verification is needed

business.title: Business information
business.subtitle: Here's our recommended Playbook configuration. Feel free to edit it to better suit your needs.

address.title: Business address
address.label: Request that users provide their business address

type.title: Legal entity type
type.label: Request users to provide their business legal entity type

website.title: Website
website.label: Request users to provide their business website

phone-number.title: Phone number
phone-number.label: Request that users provide their business phone number

custom-docs.title: Additional documents
custom-docs.description: Additional proofs that may help you analyze the user
